prompt: Black and white line art for a childrens coloring book. Pure white background. Bold thick clean black outlines only, no color, no fill, no shading, no gradients, no gray tones. Friendly simple composition suitable for a young child to color with crayons. At the center a small friendly AI core shown as a simple sphere with a happy smiling face. Around it a harness frame of thin guide-rails and small sensors. A pair of stylized human hands cradling and holding the AI core and harness from below. Square 1:1. No text, no watermark, no logos.
